_meta.purpose: Stage 2b — enterprise rollup. Same source and logic as m_26_14-score-rollup but groups by run_id (always 'engine' for in-stack docs) to produce a single enterprise-wide doc. The m_26_14-score-rollup-pipeline dest pipeline detects the absence of asset.component (enterprise case) and sets asset.id:'_rollup' with no component, _id='rollup::_enterprise'. score_inventory/score_coverage/score_retention (0-4) represent the enterprise-wide maturity levels across ALL canonical entities in all components. There is no waterline doc (out of scope for Phase 1 — operations and log_mgmt are deferred to separate efforts). Run AFTER m_26_14-score-entity completes its cycle; same offset as m_26_14-score-rollup.
_meta.dependency_order: 5 of 5 scoring transforms (after score-entity, concurrent with score-rollup)
